goals.objective: Convert JaxPlanetPolicy and JaxAttentionPlanetPolicy to the ComposablePlanetPolicy framework, update PPO to handle AutoregressivePointerDecoder outputs, set gnn_pointer as the default architecture, and verify training runs without silent failure.

checkpoints.evidence: Created active ultragoal 502bf01b for composable policy conversion, PPO autoregressive pointer support, gnn_pointer default, and training validation.

Converted JaxPlanetPolicy/JaxAttentionPlanetPolicy to ComposablePlanetPolicy wrappers; PPO rollout/update now carries sequence-shaped target/bucket/log_prob/returns/advantages for multi-launch pointer decoding; gnn_pointer is Hydra/schema/default_cfg default. Verification passed: rtk uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_jax_policy.py tests/test_jax_ppo.py tests/test_feature_registry.py -q => 25 passed; rtk uv run python scripts/generate_default_cfg.py --check => pass; tiny gnn_pointer training smoke exited successfully with update=1 steps=1 loss=-0.0052 entropy=3.440.

All requested requirements are implemented and verified. Multi-launch is preserved end-to-end: pointer decoder exposes decoded target sequences, rollout stores sequence-shaped targets/buckets/log_probs, action construction emits multiple fleet slots per source with bounded per-step ship allocation, and PPO update uses teacher-forced target sequences for autoregressive log-prob recomputation. Defaults are gnn_pointer in schema/Hydra/default_cfg. Verification: 25 focused tests passed, default_cfg --check passed, and one-update gnn_pointer training smoke completed with finite update line: update=1 steps=1 episodes=0 loss=-0.0052 entropy=3.440.
